title: DoubleJump999
description: A mod that allows players to jump a configurable number of times (default is 10 cause why not) with a  configurable cooldown (default is 40 ticks or 2 seconds) to prevent flying
body:
DoubleJump999 is a lightweight client-side mod that gives your Minecraft character the power of double jumping, just like in classic platformers! With a single tap of your jump key after your initial jump, you can jump again mid-air — adding mobility, fun, and fluidity to exploration and combat.

 No commands. No config (for now). Just install and fly (well, almost).

🕹️ How Does It Work?

🔄 Press jump twice — the second press triggers a powerful mid-air boost!

🕒 A cooldown of 2 seconds prevents accidental spam.

🧠 Smart detection avoids false triggers and respects in-game physics.

✨ Works in Creative, Survival, and Adventure modes.

🧍 Client-side only — won't affect servers or other players.

🎯 Why Use DoubleJump999?

Parkour with ease 🧗

Escape mobs with style 🧟

Add flair to your gameplay 🌀

Perfect for modpacks and vanilla+ adventures 🔧

⚙️ Installation

Download and install Minecraft Forge for your desired version.

Drop doublejump999.jar into your mods/ folder.

Launch Minecraft and jump twice to believe it!
